description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Griklor the Restless'

requirements.label: Do not allow the Ry`Gorr to unleash their war cry.

requirements.label: Do not let any of the undead sacrifice themselves to Derakor.

requirements.label: Prevent the Servant of the Sleeper from leaving its platform.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Griklor the Restless'

requirements.label: Do not allow Griklor to spend too long on his mount.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Animated Derakor'

requirements.label: Ensure that no one gets too close to the crystals.

title: Now That's Cold
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Heart of Frozen Shadow'

requirements.label: Trigger the Tendrils of Restless Ice at least 7 times.

title: Sacrifice Is All
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Restless Avatar of War'

requirements.label: Always sacrifice someone when Rallos requires it.

description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Griklor the Restless'

title: The Last Word
description: This special challenge can be completed during the raid event 'Till Death Do Us Part'

requirements.label: Allow Nosja to get the killshot on Daman or allow Daman to get the killshot on Nosja.
